name: Gage Check Cashing
description_short: Gage Check Cashing offers check cashing and related financial services at a single Los Angeles location on East Gage Avenue, operating extended hours seven days a week.
description_long: Gage Check Cashing is a check-cashing service located at 1903 E Gage Ave in Los Angeles, CA 90001. The business operates as a traditional check-cashing storefront serving the local South Los Angeles community. Based on the available information from their business listing, the company provides standard check-cashing services typical of this category. The company maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week, opening at 10:00 AM and closing at 7:00 PM daily, including weekends, which indicates a commitment to accessibility for working customers. Without access to their full website or detailed service menu beyond the Waze directory listing, the specific range of services—whether they offer money orders, wire transfers, bill payments, or other financial services commonly provided by check-cashing outlets—cannot be definitively confirmed. The business appears to serve a neighborhood-based clientele in Los Angeles. Like most check-cashing services, Gage Check Cashing likely appeals to unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to funds from checks without maintaining a traditional bank account. The limited publicly available information suggests this is a modest, single-location operation rather than a chain service. Consumers should verify current fees, accepted check types, and specific services offered by contacting the business directly at (323) 588-7508 before visiting.
